member_descriptions: object: dresser | attrs: dark wood, multiple drawers, metal drawer pulls | anchor: x=0.0, z=-6.0 | nearby: tv@(0.0,-6.0), wall (grey)@(0.0,-6.0)
dark wooden dresser, right edge crop
object: dresser | attrs: dark wood, three+ drawers, metal hardware | anchor: x=0.0, z=-6.0 | nearby: tv@(0.0,-6.0), right-side center wall@(0.0,-4.5)
member_long_descriptions: Partial top view of a dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a glossy finish and beveled front corner; visible surface wear and small chips at the front edge, a rectangular top with decorative coasters/objects on it, edge-cropped in the image and seen at approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark stained wooden paneled headboard with a polished finish, shown beside a striped pillow and bedding at lower right; left side of the headboard is cut off by the image edge — appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with recessed vertical panels and visible wood grain at the right edge of the image, topped by a white countertop corner; the object is edge-cropped and shows minor wear at the countertop edge, estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

object: dresser | attributes: dark wood, multiple drawers, metal drawer pulls | camera_relation: distance=1.1, bearing=-35.0, laterality=left, verticality=low | global_anchor: x=0.0, z=-6.0 | surroundings: tv | relation=on top of | primary_dist=0.1 | global=(0.0,-6.0); wall (grey) | relation=against | primary_dist=0.2 | global=(0.0,-6.0); electrical outlet with plug | relation=lower right along same wall | primary_dist=0.9 | global=(0.0,-5.0); interior door | relation=to the right | primary_dist=1.8 | global=(-0.5,-5.0) | scene_context: floor_pattern=carpet; scene_attributes=grey painted walls, white baseboard molding, textured right-side wall, flat-screen TV on dresser reflecting a lamp and doorway, interior white paneled door partially open, power outlet with black cable near baseboard; wall_color=grey

Partial edge crop showing the top corner of a dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with glossy finish and visible wood grain; beveled rectangular top and exposed side face visible in dim lighting, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark stained wooden dresser with carved molding and multiple raised-panel drawers, small dark knobs and a polished finish; front is partially occluded by the bed in the foreground and the top surface is visible with small items — roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden dresser with paneled drawer fronts and horizontal metal pull handles, two small top drawers above larger full-width drawers, ornate molded trim; object is partially cropped at the right edge of the image and appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark reddish-brown varnished wooden nightstand top with a rectangular beveled edge, visible wear and scuffs on the front corner, glossy finish with light reflections, and a couple of small decorative coasters on the surface; estimated distance to camera ≈0.6 m.

Partial close-up (≈1.2 m) of a dark brown, glossy paneled wooden headboard with recessed rectangular panels and the adjacent bed corner with light striped pillow and sheets; the headboard is cut off at the crop edge.

Close-up of a dark stained wooden paneled shelf or cabinet side with a white countertop edge visible along the top; the wood shows a semi-gloss finish and inset vertical rectangular panels, the object is partially cropped at the right edge and appears about 0.5–0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet corner showing vertical recessed panel doors and the light-colored countertop edge at the top; top edge shows minor wear and the image is a close-range capture (approximately 0.8 m from camera).

King-size bed with a beige-and-gray striped duvet and two matching pillow shams against a dark stained wooden headboard; bed fills the foreground and the left headboard is partially edge-cropped — camera approximately 1.5 m from the near edge of the bed.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown wooden nightstand showing the near top corner and side with a glossy finish, visible horizontal wood grain, a beveled front edge and minor surface scuffs; only the corner/top is visible and the object appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden dresser with multiple horizontal drawers and decorative carved trim; metal drawer pulls visible across the front, top surface with small objects partially visible; lower front is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the right edge of the dresser is cropped by the image border, appears close to the camera (approximately 1.5 m).

Partial/edge crop of a dark brown wooden dresser (approx. 1.2 m from camera) showing multiple paneled drawer fronts with small metal knobs and bar handles, slightly glossy finish and visible molding around drawer edges; top and left side are cut off by the image border.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown wooden nightstand showing the near top corner and side with a glossy finish, visible horizontal wood grain, a beveled front edge and minor surface scuffs; only the corner/top is visible and the object appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: Beige fabric shade table lamp cropped
member_long_descriptions: Beige fabric lampshade with dark vertical trim over an ornate dark turned base (metal or wood finish), lamp is lit and sits on a tabletop; right side of the shade is slightly edge-cropped in the image, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial view of a beige, slightly pleated fabric lampshade emitting warm yellow light atop a turned dark wooden base with a small brass finial and visible pull chain; the lamp is edge-cropped and slightly blurred, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Beige pleated fabric bell-shaped shade with dark vertical trim sits above a carved dark-brown turned base on a square stepped plinth; lamp is illuminated, mostly visible but the right side of the shade is slightly edge-cropped, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Partial/edge-cropped view of an illuminated cream/off-white fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and a scalloped lower edge, mounted on a turned dark wood (or dark-finished) base; small decorative pull or finial hangs beneath the shade; lamp appears warm-lit and is photographed at close range (approximately 0.8 m from camera).
clusters.representative_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of an illuminated cream/off-white fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and a scalloped lower edge, mounted on a turned dark wood (or dark-finished) base; small decorative pull or finial hangs beneath the shade; lamp appears warm-lit and is photographed at close range (approximately 0.8 m from camera).

member_descriptions: light blue patterned rug edge crop
cream and gray striped lumbar pillow
member_long_descriptions: Close-up partial view of a rectangular pillow with beige-and-gray horizontal stripes showing the side edge and seam; woven fabric texture with slight compression and light wear, cropped at the image borders — estimated ~0.5 m from the camera.

Close-up (≈0.5 m) view of the top corner of an off-white pillow with a fabric pillowcase, visible seam/piping and surface creases; soft stuffed rectangular form, partially edge-cropped by the image border.

Partial view of a low-pile rectangular light-blue and gray rug with a mottled, pixelated geometric pattern; the rug is edge-cropped in the frame, shows slight wear and darker spots, and appears to lie on a wooden floor about 0.8 m from the camera.
Partial edge-cropped tan/beige fabric rug with tight wrinkles and visible creases, appearing bunched or draped rather than lying flat; close to the camera (approx. 0.3 m).

Large king-size bed with beige-and-gray horizontal striped duvet and two matching pillows; dark stained wooden headboard is visible but partially cropped at the left edge; mattress and bedding fill the foreground and appear neatly made and close to the camera (≈1.5 m).

Beige/cream rectangular lumbar pillow with horizontal gray and muted blue stripes and a soft, slightly wrinkled fabric texture; the cushion is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).

Partial/edge-cropped view of a rectangular beige-gray pillow with muted horizontal stripes in a woven fabric; appears soft and slightly flattened, cut off at the crop edges, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial beige/cream rectangular pillow with horizontal tan and brown stripes, woven fabric texture and a visible seam along one edge; the object is cut off by the image border and appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).

Close-up of a rumpled white/cream cotton pillow with wrinkled pillowcase and soft, plush fill; the pillow is partially cut off at the image edge with a beige striped blanket or sheet visible alongside; image appears low-resolution/pixelated; estimated distance ~0.4 m from camera.

Rectangular bluish-gray woven rug with a mottled patchwork/checkered pattern and low pile; appears faded and slightly worn, and is partially cut off at the image edges (edge-cropped) — roughly 1.0 meter from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped tan/beige plush rug with visible wrinkles and a slight sheen, showing a faint mottled pattern and soft fabric texture; appears rumpled and partially folded, estimated distance to camera ~0.8 m.

Rectangular cream-and-gray striped lumbar pillow with woven fabric texture and light creasing, horizontally positioned and partially edge-cropped in the frame; appears to be a medium-sized throw pillow approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped rectangular beige fabric pillow with brown horizontal stripes, visible piping/seam and a soft, slightly wrinkled textile texture; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m away).

Partial, vertically oriented gray woven basket with a textured herringbone/diamond weave and a visible top loop or handle; appears fabric-like (soft woven material), leaning against a light surface with its bottom near a wooden floor — top and right edges are cropped in the image; estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a rectangular beige-gray pillow with muted horizontal stripes in a woven fabric; appears soft and slightly flattened, cut off at the crop edges, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: dark wood-blade ceiling fan with light
member_long_descriptions: Downward-view ceiling fan with five dark wood-finish blades and a central frosted glass dome light in a metal housing, mounted to a pale ceiling; blades are slightly edge-cropped in the image — the fan appears to be about 3.0 meters from the camera.

Ceiling-mounted five-blade fan with dark wood blades and a central frosted glass light globe that is illuminated; metallic central hub and collar visible; several blades are partially edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 2.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Downward-view ceiling fan with five dark wood-finish blades and a central frosted glass dome light in a metal housing, mounted to a pale ceiling; blades are slightly edge-cropped in the image — the fan appears to be about 3.0 meters from the camera.

member_descriptions: blue fabric rectangular basket edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Square, collapsible dark-blue fabric storage bin with beige trim and a front loop handle; woven-texture panels, open top, upright and appearing empty on the floor, visible at approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Blue fabric rectangular storage basket with a quilted/diamond texture and a beige fabric loop handle on the front; soft-sided box shape, slightly edge-cropped in the image, appearing about 0.7 m from the camera.

Tall cylindrical gray woven basket with a chevron/herringbone textile pattern and a dark interior opening; the object is partially edge-cropped in the frame, appears fabric or painted wicker in texture, standing on a wood floor, approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Upright blue fabric storage basket with a diamond/quilted texture and a beige fabric handle loop on the front; rectangular open-top, soft-sided bin that is edge-cropped on the left of the image and appears to sit on the floor, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Upright blue fabric storage basket with a diamond/quilted texture and a beige fabric handle loop on the front; rectangular open-top, soft-sided bin that is edge-cropped on the left of the image and appears to sit on the floor, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: white slatted blinds framed by curtains
member_long_descriptions: Full-height interior rectangular window with closed white horizontal slatted blinds (likely vinyl/plastic), framed by dark blue/black curtains left and right and partially occluded at the lower-left by a wooden nightstand; light softly filters through the slats; approximate distance from camera ~2.5 m.

Full-height interior window with closed white horizontal blinds (vinyl or painted slats) flanked by dark fabric curtains; wooden sill visible and lower-left corner is slightly occluded by a small wooden cabinet; scene appears photographed from roughly 2.5 meters away.
clusters.representative_description: Full-height interior rectangular window with closed white horizontal slatted blinds (likely vinyl/plastic), framed by dark blue/black curtains left and right and partially occluded at the lower-left by a wooden nightstand; light softly filters through the slats; approximate distance from camera ~2.5 m.
